title: Discussing Homework 讨论作业
scene: 放学后两个同学在一起讨论今天的数学作业。

lines.en: Ben, do you understand today's math homework?
lines.zh: 本，你明白今天的数学作业吗？

lines.en: Most of it. But question five is really hard.
lines.zh: 大部分懂。但第五题真的很难。

lines.en: Yes! I've been working on it for half an hour.
lines.zh: 是的！我已经做了半个小时了。

lines.en: Let me see. Oh, I think we need to use fractions here.
lines.zh: 我看看。哦，我觉得这里要用分数。

lines.en: Fractions? But the teacher didn't teach that yet.
lines.zh: 分数？但是老师还没教那个。

lines.en: That's why it's a challenge question. It's extra credit.
lines.zh: 所以它是挑战题。是附加分的。

lines.en: Oh, I see! No wonder it was so hard.
lines.zh: 哦，我明白了！难怪那么难。

lines.en: Let's work on it together. Two heads are better than one.
lines.zh: 我们一起做吧。两人智慧胜一人。

lines.en: Good idea! You do the first step, and I'll do the second.
lines.zh: 好主意！你做第一步，我做第二步。

lines.en: Deal! I think we can figure it out!
lines.zh: 说定了！我觉得我们能做出来！
